name: MistralConnector
description: Connects to the Mistral AI REST API (Chat Completions, Embeddings, Files, Fine-tuning, Models, Agents) using a Bearer API key. Supports chat + embeddings inference, fine-tuning lifecycle, file upload management, and KB cataloguing of models + uploaded files.

install_fields.label: Mistral API Key
install_fields.help: From console.mistral.ai → API Keys. Sent as `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` on every request.

install_fields.label: Mistral API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Mistral REST API. Override only when routing through an approved proxy.

install_fields.label: Default Chat Model
install_fields.help: Hint for callers — model ID used when create_chat_completion() is invoked without an explicit model argument.

install_fields.label: Default Embeddings Model
install_fields.help: Hint for callers — model ID used when create_embeddings() is invoked without an explicit model argument.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Soft client-side cap on Mistral API requests per minute. Default 60.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates the API key by probing GET /models and marks the connector as installed.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Mistral API connectivity by issuing GET /models with the stored API key.

apis.name: Create Chat Completion
apis.description: POST /chat/completions — generates a model response from a list of chat messages.

apis.name: Create Embeddings
apis.description: POST /embeddings — returns embedding vectors for one or more inputs. Wire key is `input` (singular).

apis.name: List Models
apis.description: GET /models — returns every model visible to the configured API key.

apis.name: Get Model
apis.description: GET /models/{id} — fetch a single model record.

apis.name: Delete Model
apis.description: DELETE /models/{id} — removes a fine-tuned model from the account.

apis.name: List Files
apis.description: GET /files — paginate uploaded files, optionally filtered by purpose.

apis.name: Upload File
apis.description: POST /files — multipart upload of a training or batch input file.

apis.name: Get File
apis.description: GET /files/{id} — returns metadata for a single uploaded file.

apis.name: Create Fine-Tuning Job
apis.description: POST /fine_tuning/jobs — starts a fine-tuning run against a base model and uploaded training files.
